subcodes.first_line: This day, in all the Sacred Scriptures and heavenly Books, is mentioned and renowned as the Day of God. Blessed is the soul that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز در جمیع صحف و کتب الهی بیوم الله مذکور و معروف طوبی از برای نفسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
